commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Haste. Hebrew, "by vanity "and injustice. Those who become rich on a sudden fall under suspicion, as a Roman objected to Sylla, who had inherited nothing. (Plut.)
By little. Hebrew, "he that gathereth by labour, (Septuagint, piety) shall increase. "(Protestants) (Haydock)
